listitem.para: Three-element one-based start index [row col slice].

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Extracts a sub-volume using one-based [row col slice] start coordinates and [rows cols slices] dimensions. For multipage image files returned by imreadmulti, convert the page dimension to a scalar 3-D volume before cropping.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: This example uses the public ImageJ MRI stack sample mri-stack.zip.
